name: bq-nb-lib

metadata.name: bq-nb-lib
metadata.summary: A utility package for managing S3, Slack, and AlertOps integrations.

documentation:
# bq_nb_lib

A utility package for managing AWS S3, Slack notifications, and AlertOps integrations.

## Installation

```bash
pip install bq_nb_lib

classes.name: bq_nb_lib.secret_manager.SecretManager

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.secret_manager.SecretManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the SecretManager.

Args:
    project_id (str): Google Cloud Project ID.
    logger (Logger): Your custom logger instance.
    service_account_json (str, optional): Path to a service account JSON key file.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.secret_manager.SecretManager._init_secret_manager
documentation:
Initializes the Secret Manager client with flexible authentication.

Args:
    service_account_json (str, optional): Path to a service account JSON key file.

Returns:
    SecretManagerServiceClient: Initialized client instance.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.secret_manager.SecretManager.get_secret
documentation:
Retrieve a secret from Google Secret Manager or fallback to an environment variable.

Args:
    secret_name (str): The name of the secret in Secret Manager.
    fallback_env_var (str): Optional environment variable as a fallback.

Returns:
    str: The secret value.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the secret cannot be retrieved.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.secret_manager.SecretManager.mask_secret
documentation:
Mask a secret to protect it in logs.

Args:
    secret (str): The secret value to mask.

Returns:
    str: Masked secret.
A utility class for managing secrets from Google Secret Manager with flexible authentication methods.

classes.name: bq_nb_lib.s3_handler.S3Handler

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.s3_handler.S3Handler.__init__
documentation:
Initializes S3Handler with configurations for AWS S3 and notifications.

Args:
    s3_bucket_name (str): AWS S3 bucket for data uploads.
    bucket_name (str): GCP bucket for logs (used for notifications).
    s3_region (str): AWS S3 region.
    access_key_id_secret_name (str): Name of the secret for AWS access key ID.
    secret_key_secret_name (str): Name of the secret for AWS secret key.
    secret_manager (SecretManager): Instance of the new SecretManager class.
    slack_notifier (SlackNotifier): Instance for sending Slack notifications.
    alert_ops_notifier (AlertOpsNotifier): Instance for sending AlertOps notifications.
    logger (Logger): Instance of your custom Logger class.
    send_to_s3 (bool): Flag to enable/disable S3 uploads.
    alert_to_alert_ops (bool): Flag to enable/disable AlertOps notifications.
    alert_to_slack (bool): Flag to enable/disable Slack notifications.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.s3_handler.S3Handler.init_s3
documentation: Initializes the S3 client with AWS credentials fetched from Secret Manager.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.s3_handler.S3Handler.upload_to_s3
documentation:
Uploads a file to S3.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the local file to upload.
    s3_key_prefix (str): Prefix for the file in the S3 bucket.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.s3_handler.S3Handler.handle_error
documentation:
Handles errors by logging and sending notifications to Slack and AlertOps.

Args:
    error_message (str): The error message to log and send.
    failing_step (str): The step where the error occurred.
Utility class for managing AWS S3 interactions and notifications.

classes.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the SlackNotifier.

Args:
    logger (object): Logger instance for logging.
    secret_manager (SecretManager): Instance of SecretManager.
    slack_channel_secret_list (list): List of specific secret names in Google Secret Manager for partial links.
    direct_webhook_urls (list): List of full or partial Slack webhook URLs provided directly.
    slack_channel_secret_prefix (str): Prefix for Slack channel secrets in Google Secret Manager.
    bucket_name (str): Name of the bucket for storing logs.
    webhook_url_prefix (str): Prefix for Slack webhook URLs.
    is_test (bool): Flag to indicate if messages are test messages (default: False).

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier._is_partial_url
documentation:
Checks if a URL is partial (does not include the full Slack webhook prefix).

Args:
    url (str): The URL to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the URL is partial, False if it's full.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier._retrieve_and_combine_webhook_urls
documentation:
Retrieves Slack webhook URLs from provided secret names and direct URLs, combines them uniquely.

Args:
    secret_list (list): List of secret names to fetch from Secret Manager.
    direct_urls (list): List of full or partial webhook URLs provided directly.

Returns:
    list: Unique Slack webhook URLs.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier._send_message
documentation:
Sends the message to all Slack webhook URLs.

Args:
    message (str): The message to send.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier._format_message
documentation:
Formats a message by adding a line break and a tab before each new line.

Args:
    message (str): The message to format.

Returns:
    str: The formatted message.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier.success
documentation:
Sends a success message to Slack.

Args:
    success_message (str): The success message content.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier.error
documentation:
Sends an error message to Slack.

Args:
    error_message (str): The error message content.
    failing_step (str): The step where the error occurred.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.slack_alert.SlackNotifier.warning
documentation:
Sends a warning message to Slack.

Args:
    warning_message (str): The warning message content.
    affected_step (str): The step where the warning occurred.
A class for sending notifications to Slack using webhooks retrieved from Google Secret Manager or provided directly.

functions.name: bq_nb_lib.initialize_components
documentation:
Centralized initialization for Logger, SlackNotifier, AlertOpsNotifier, and S3Handler.

Args:
    secret_project_name (str): GCP project containing secrets.
    bucket_name (str): Logging bucket name.
    s3_bucket_name (str): AWS S3 bucket for uploads.
    s3_region (str): AWS S3 region.
    access_key_id_secret_name (str): Secret name for AWS access key ID.
    secret_key_secret_name (str): Secret name for AWS secret key.
    slack_channel_secret_list (list, optional): List of Slack channel secrets in Secret Manager.
    direct_slack_webhook_urls (list, optional): List of direct Slack webhook URLs.
    alert_ops_api_key_secret_name (str, optional): Secret name for AlertOps API key.
    log_file_prefix (str, optional): Log file prefix (default: "bigquery_notebook_logs").
    send_to_s3 (bool): Flag to enable/disable S3 uploads.
    alert_to_slack (bool): Flag to enable/disable Slack notifications.
    alert_to_alert_ops (bool): Flag to enable/disable AlertOps notifications.
    alert_closure_time (int): Time (in seconds) to wait before closing alerts.

Returns:
    dict: Initialized components (logger, slack_notifier, alert_ops_notifier, s3_handler).

classes.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger._initialize
documentation:
Initializes the logger with a file handler and stream handler.

Args:
    log_file_prefix (str): Prefix for the log file name.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger.info
documentation: Logs an info-level message.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger.error
documentation: Logs an error-level message.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger.warning
documentation: Logs a warning-level message.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger.debug
documentation: Logs a debug-level message.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger.critical
documentation: Logs a critical-level message.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger.log_form_parameters
documentation: Dynamically identifies and logs all form parameters defined using # @param.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger.get_log_file_path
documentation:
Returns the path to the current log file.

Returns:
    str: The path of the current log file.

class_variables.name: bq_nb_lib.logger_init.Logger._instance
documentation: Singleton instance
A singleton logger class to handle logging across the application.

classes.name: bq_nb_lib.alert_ops.AlertOpsNotifier

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.alert_ops.AlertOpsNotifier.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the AlertOpsNotifier.

Args:
    secret_name (str): Secret name in Google Secret Manager for the API key.
    logger (object): Logger instance for logging.
    secret_manager (SecretManager): Instance of SecretManager.
    closure_time (int): Time (in seconds) to wait before closing alerts.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.alert_ops.AlertOpsNotifier.send_notification
documentation:
Sends a notification to AlertOps.

Args:
    source (str, optional): The source of the issue (default: 'Unknown Source').
    severity (str, optional): The severity of the issue (default: 'Info').
    details (str, optional): Specific error message or description (default: 'No additional details provided.').
    priority (str, optional): The priority of the alert (default: 'High').

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.alert_ops.AlertOpsNotifier.schedule_alert_closure
documentation:
Schedules the alert closure after the configured delay.

Args:
    token (str): The token of the alert to be closed.

methods.name: bq_nb_lib.alert_ops.AlertOpsNotifier.close_alert
documentation:
Closes the alert in AlertOps using the provided token.

Args:
    token (str): The token of the alert to be closed.
A class for sending notifications to AlertOps and managing alert lifecycle.
